violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked by (bakers rack). A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/03/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Unit taken out of service to be washed and sanitized. PIC voluntarily disposed of food product. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/03/2024

The food-contact surfaces of equipment and utensils were not sanitized. The required utensil surface temperature of 160 degrees Fahrenheit was not achieved during the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher as evidenced by the failure of the thermolabel (temperature indicator) affixed to the surface of a utensil to turn black.PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 09/03/2024
Utensils were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/03/2024

Knives was observed being stored between the wall and knife holder. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location.PIC removed, washed, and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/03/2024
Handwashing sink and 2 Dr refrigerator door handles located in the (kitchen) area was not in good repair. Both observed broken and covered with duct tape. New Violation. Correct By: 10/03/2024

Prep unit located in the (kitchen) area was not in good repair. Ambient temperatures observed at 48DF.Food product that was prepped hour prior to inspection was moved to colder unit. Establishment not allowed to store any TCS food product in unit until repaired and/or replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 09/03/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the (food equipment and utensil shelves) in kitchen area have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 09/03/2024
The condensate from the prep unit refrigeration unit was observed pooling in unit. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 09/03/2024
The receptacle in the women's toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 09/03/2024
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/03/2024

The floors, walls, ceilings in kitchen have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 09/10/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the basement and outside back area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 09/10/2024
